cartoons.image_alt: Two teachers watch as two students give each other a “six seven” gesture.
cartoons.caption: "I miss when six was afraid of seven."
cartoons.author: Emily Flake
cartoons.title: Daily Cartoon: Friday, February 27th

humor_links.title: Why you’re considered attractive.
I’ll start this new project just as soon as all conditions in my life are perfect.
More precise names for the “Personal Life” section on Wikipedia.
It’s becoming pretty clear that something is going on with the crossword constructor.
I’m a teacher and I do, in fact, live at school.
Hinder: a dating app for emotionally unavailable men.

cartoons.image_alt: A woman digs a car out of deep snow. A sullen child sits nearby next to an unused shovel.
cartoons.caption: "If you don’t help dig out the car, then I can’t take you to school, and if you don’t go to school I’m going to lose my friggin’ mind. You don’t want Mommy to lose her friggin’ mind, do you?"
cartoons.author: Guy Richards Smit
